title: Quentin
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Quentin''' was a [[Lok Revenants/Legends|Lok Revenant]] fighter pilot. He was part of [[Nym/Legends|Nym's]] tutorial to help Nym familiarize himself with his new modifications [[Jinkins]] made. It is unknown if he participated in any battles, although it is likely.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]'' {{1st}}
